docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO CLAIMANT SOLLID, RICHARD
FILING FEES UNLIMITED ( $450.00 ) FILED BY CLAIMANT SOLLID, RICHARD

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-04-2014 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/CLAIMANT RICHARD SOLLID'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT.
